description_long: This rifle features a long, precision barrel with a mounted telescopic scope for enhanced accuracy at distance. The body is constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a distinctive camouflage pattern in shades of brown, black, and gray. It is equipped with a bipod for stability during prone or supported firing, and a robust, adjustable stock with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The muzzle appears to have a simple, unadorned finish, lacking any visible suppressor or brake. The overall design suggests a modern sniper or marksman rifle intended for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, bipod, and camouflage finish, featuring a detachable box magazine and adjustable stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs splayed outward, and the scope aligned above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, scope, bipod, magazine, and the detailed stock with pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the bipod and magazine.
